weight.$description: Weight ramp. Reading-first UI leans on regular + semibold; bold for headings/display.

leading.$description: Line-height multipliers (unitless). Tighter as size grows; relaxed for long-form reading.

tracking.$description: Letter-spacing. DTCG 2025.10 has no letterSpacing sub-property on the typography composite, so these stay standalone and are applied at the CSS layer (display = tight, uppercase labels = wide).
